subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O Amín, for having quaffed the chalice of certitude and turned towards God, the sovereign, the manifest Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا امین بما شربت کاس الیقین و اقبلت الی الله الملک الحق المبین نبذت
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
